{"society_power": 2.8, "state_power": 3.0, "society_change": 1.5, "state_change": -4.6, "key_event": "Independence, Force Publique mutiny, secessions, and state collapse", "reasoning": "The strong colonial state collapsed almost immediately at independence\u2014army mutiny, Katanga/Kasai secessions, coups, and rebellions reduced it to weak/contested authority dependent on UN force; meanwhile ethnic-nationalist mobilization (ABAKO, unions, riots) raised society's mobilizational capacity, though along fragmented, divisive lines."}
